eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles; Orange, CA; at 06:57 PM ON MAY 22, 2026 Effective until 08:57 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE ALHAMBRA POLICE DEPARTMENT. 

ON MAY 22, 2026, AT 5 25 PM, RAMEY CAYDEN WAS TAKEN FROM ALHAMBRA, CALIFORNIA. CAYDEN RAMEY IS A 3-MONTH-OLD HISPANIC MALE, 21 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING APPROXIMATELY 17 POUNDS, WITH BROWN HAIR AND GREEN EYES.  CAYDEN RAMEY IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A BLUE LONG SLEEVE SHIRT AND GREEN SWEATPANTS.

THE SUSPECT IS AN UNKNOWN HISPANIC MALE, STANDING 5 FEET 10 INCHES TALL, WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES.   THE SUSPECT IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A BLACK SHIRT, BLACK PACKPACK WITH BLUE AND BLACK PANTS.  


THE SUSPECT WAS LAST SEEN DRIVING A 2015 BLACK HONDA CIVIC, WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NUMBER 7KFZ167.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
